art_highlights: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, returning to pre-pandemic levels
High-end segment ($1M+ sales) grew 21%, driving overall market recovery
Middle East region becoming a major focal point for 2026 with new institutional openings
Digital art continues to mature; hybrid sales models integrating physical/online are now standard
Art fairs rebound strongly, accounting for 35% of dealer turnover in 2025

market_summary.market_sentiment: Cautious Optimism (43% of dealers expect improvement in 2026)
market_summary.key_drivers: High-end resilience, in-person event resurgence, and strategic gallery adaptation
market_summary.trend: Localization of sales and focus on established blue-chip value alongside emerging digital/experiential works
